body_txt: Sometimes an animal (or two animals) can symbolize a character or characters (humans or anthropomorphized animals) in a work. If the characters are human, these animals will generally be their pets, but in works of fantasy it's not uncommon for the characters to be transformed into animals and have to work together to return to safety and human form, learning more about each other along the way. The most common form of this trope is the portrayal of two animals whose relationship mirrors or symbolizes the relationship between their owners. Can be case of Truth in Television in that pets' behaviour tends to reflect their masters' moods. Related to Faux Symbolism . Subtrope of Animal Motifs . Supertrope to Caged Bird Metaphor .
